meanings.definition: not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances
examples: a near hit by the bomb
the near or nigh horse is the one on the left
the animal's left side is its near or nigh side
very close (or near) with his money

meanings.definition: with or in a close or intimate relationship
examples: my sisters and brothers are near and dear

meanings.definition: (superlative of `near' or `close') within the shortest distance
examples: that was the time he came nearest to death
